personality_one_liner: A premium, cinematic, and highly restrained utility experience, using deep matte charcoal and rich metallic gold to exude trust, exclusivity, and elegance.

spacing.rule: Handle spacing correctly dont have extra spaces where its not required, handle padding and margin corectly and subtle for buttons and components. Content should feel spacious and cinematic.

do's: Use glass on headers, bottom sheets, and the background of floating action buttons.
Pair blur with a translucent tinted base (≥75% of surface) underneath to guarantee contrast.
Use on premium featured cards sitting over abstract texture imagery.
dont's: Never apply glass to form fields or body text regions.
Never rely on blur alone for readability without the darkened base layer.

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: A highly refined, password-less entry point validating residency.

states.loading: Subtle gold spinner centered in dark void.

screens.layout: Minimalist single-column layout. Massive 'SATRWA' logo and 'Sri Anjaneya Township' display text in gold serif. Use a grid of refined cards to select Flat Block (A-F), followed by a clean, large typography input for Flat Number. Stick primary CTA at the bottom using safe area.

screens.name: Home / Landing
screens.purpose: The digital concierge offering direct paths to Payments and Bookings.

states.loading: Dark skeleton cards with subtle gold shimmer.
states.error: Error fetching flat data - with a retry gold-bordered button.

screens.layout: Welcome header utilizing glassmorphism over subtle background scroll. Two massive hero cards: 'Maintenance Payment' over abstract gold/black texture with glass overlay, and 'Clubhouse Booking' over the pool image. Cards are full width with 'lg' outer margin, featuring large serif titles and thin Phosphor right arrows.

screens.name: Maintenance Payment
screens.purpose: Clear breakdown of dues and payment configuration.

states.empty: A luxurious 'All Clear' illustration - gold tick with text 'No pending dues'.

screens.layout: Top section features oversized serif typography showing total dues in gold. Segmented control/pills (Pay Full vs Pay One Month) styled with brandTertiary active state. Breakdown rows (e.g., 2 BHK base, Conveyance charge) presented in a surfaceSecondary card separated by 1px 'border'. Sticky gold 'Pay' CTA at the bottom over a glassmorphic gradient bar.

screens.name: Amenity Booking
screens.purpose: Showcase premium facilities for booking with a strict dues-gate overlay.

states.error: If dues are pending, the entire screen is locked behind a frosted glass overlay with a deep ruby warning card ('Clear Dues First') and a CTA routing to Maintenance.

screens.layout: Vertical list of lush, full-bleed image cards (Gym and Pool) separated by 3xl spacing. Images MUST use a top-to-bottom gradient scrim (transparent to ≥70% surfaceInverse) to guarantee text contrast. Serif titles overlaid at the bottom of the card.

screens.name: Mock UPI Payment

states.loading: Simulating payment with a gold pulse animation.

screens.layout: Centered layout on surfaceSecondary. Features a mockup QR code centered inside a gold 'borderStrong' frame. Input field for UPI ID below it. Submit button is sticky at bottom.

screens.name: Receipt View
screens.purpose: A premium digital record styled like a luxury certificate.
screens.layout: Designed like a digital ticket. SurfaceSecondary card with 'borderStrong' thin gold stroke. Dotted divider line separating the header (Receipt # OP001) from the details. Subtle SATRWA watermark in the background. Action buttons for 'Download PDF' and 'Share' at the bottom.

screens.name: Admin / Payment History
screens.purpose: Manage receipt series and view past premium transactions.
screens.layout: Structured data view. Functional layout utilizing tight serif headers and clean sans-serif rows for history. A floating action button (FAB) with glass effect to 'Add New Series' for the new FY.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strict adherence to '6 Glass / Luxe DARK' personality. Use the matte black (#0A0A0A) background to let the gold accents (#D4AF37) breathe.
No purple, blue, or neon colors under any circumstances. Stick rigidly to the black, charcoal, and gold palette.
Typography must be respected: Use Cormorant Garamond exclusively for headers, titles, metrics, and branding. Use Geist solely for body text and labels.
Implement the 'dues gate' visually using a full-screen frosted glass overlay covering the Amenity Booking list. It should feel intentional and un-ignorable without being brutal.
Receipt Screen must be treated like a premium certificate. Use thin 1px gold borders, dotted divider lines, and heavily rely on serif typography to convey official status.
Any time text sits on imagery (e.g., Amenity cards), a gradient scrim layer MUST sit between the image and the text (transparent to ≥70% surfaceInverse).
Ensure 'Pay Now' buttons sit in a safe-area aware sticky footer at the bottom of the screen, floating over content.
Do NOT use passwords. Follow the problem statement for Flat Block + Flat No login mechanism natively.
